author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island Fireworks
summary: The annual fireworks display will be at dusk on Tuesday, July 1st.  The more the merrier for this patriotic event, so bring the whole gang and all the accouterments — chairs, blankets, picnics, and glow sticks for the kids.
content:
The annual fireworks display will be at dusk on Tuesday, July 1st.  The more the merrier for this patriotic event, so bring the whole gang and all the accouterments — chairs, blankets, picnics, and glow sticks for the kids.

The show starts at dusk on a barge 2000 feet off Fred Benson Town Beach. Seen from any location, set up on the beach or in your backyard with friends and family.

 Ocean State Pyrotechnics will be putting on the fireworks display! They will be shooting them off the display from a barge off-shore! This will be very exciting!

If viewing from the water, please be sure to keep clear 1000 feet away from the barge for safety reasons.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island Fireworks
summary: The annual fireworks display will be at dusk on Monday, July 1st.  The more the merrier for this patriotic event, so bring the whole gang and all the accouterments — chairs, blankets, picnics, and glow sticks for the kids.
content:
The annual fireworks display will be at dusk on Monday, July 1st.  The more the merrier for this patriotic event, so bring the whole gang and all the accouterments — chairs, blankets, picnics, and glow sticks for the kids.

The show starts at dusk on a barge 2000 feet off Fred Benson Town Beach. Seen from any location, set up on the beach or in your backyard with friends and family.

 Ocean State Pyrotechnics will be putting on the fireworks display! They will be shooting them off the display from a barge off-shore! This will be very exciting!

If viewing from the water, please be sure to keep clear 1000 feet away from the barge for safety reasons.

Click the link below to donate to the 4th of July parade and fireworks.
 
https://www.gofundme.com/f/blockisland4thofjuly

author: Austin Crawford
title: Old Harbor Ghost Tours
summary: Block Island Ghost Tours' original walking tour, the Old Harbor Walking Tour, has been renamed to the Old Harbor Ghost Tour. Our Ghost Host (tour guide) will lead you on an easy one-mile walking tour that will shine a light on the darker, haunted history of Block Island. By far, this is still our most informative tour including Island ghost stories, folklore, and even true crime. Block Island has a long and turbulent past starting well before our original settlers in 1661. If you are looking for some of our scariest stories, we highly recommend this tour to get started.
content:
Block Island Ghost Tours' original walking tour, the Old Harbor Walking Tour, has been renamed to the Old Harbor Ghost Tour. Our Ghost Host (tour guide) will lead you on an easy one-mile walking tour that will shine a light on the darker, haunted history of Block Island. By far, this is still our most informative tour including Island ghost stories, folklore, and even true crime. Block Island has a long and turbulent past starting well before our original settlers in 1661. If you are looking for some of our scariest stories, we highly recommend this tour to get started.

 

Every tour includes a free flashlight, an “I Survived” sticker, and a $5 discount on any of our t-shirts.

 

Call 401-477-2979 or email blockislandghosttours@gmail.com to book private group tours.

Location: Check-in at Block Island Ghost Tours on the second floor of the Odd Fellows Hall

Price: $35/person. Children under 12 are $25

Time: Daily at 7 & 9pm

Length: 60-75 minutes

 

Click the link below to book a tour. 

Walking Distance: 1 mile

author: Robert Lucier
title: Block Island Fireworks
summary: The annual fireworks display will now be at dusk on Saturday, July 1st.  The more the merrier for this patriotic event, so bring the whole gang and all the accouterments — chairs, blankets, picnics, and glow sticks for the kids.
content:
The annual fireworks display will now be at dusk on Saturday, July 1st.  The more the merrier for this patriotic event, so bring the whole gang and all the accouterments — chairs, blankets, picnics, and glow sticks for the kids.

 

The show starts at dusk on a barge 2000 feet off Fred Benson Town Beach. Seen from any location, set up on the beach or in your backyard with friends and family.

 Ocean State Pyrotechnics will be putting on the fireworks display! They will be shooting them off the display from a barge off-shore! This will be very exciting!

If viewing from the water, please be sure to keep clear 1000 feet away from the barge for safety reasons.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Night Sky Viewing
summary: Lay back in the Hodge Preserve field while local naturalist narrates the season’s constellations, planets, and maybe a shooting star. Bring a blanket/towel, beach chair, flashlight, and insect repellant for your viewing comfort. If the night sky is obscured by clouds, fog, or rain the program will be postponed to the following night.
content:
Lay back in the Hodge Preserve field while local naturalist narrates the season’s constellations, planets, and maybe a shooting star. Bring a blanket/towel, beach chair, flashlight, and insect repellant for your viewing comfort. If the night sky is obscured by clouds, fog, or rain the program will be postponed to the following night.

Participation is limited, contact Kim to sign up, email: kim.gaffett@tnc.org.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Mardi Gras Party at Trader’s Dock Bar at Champlin's
summary: Join us for a New England version of Carnival! Stop by the Dock Bar to enjoy the DJ Party from 9:00pm to Midnight. We'll be featuring themed food and beverage specials throughout the day.
content: Join us for a New England version of Carnival! Stop by the Dock Bar to enjoy the DJ Party from 9:00pm to Midnight. We'll be featuring themed food and beverage specials throughout the day.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Christmas in July at Trader’s Dock Bar at Champlin's
summary: Enjoy the Holiday Spirit and the warmth of summer. Stop by to check out the decorated boats, our festive food and beverage specials and a special visit from Santa and his helpers! DJ party at the Dock Bar from 9:00pm to Midnight.
content: Enjoy the Holiday Spirit and the warmth of summer. Stop by to check out the decorated boats, our festive food and beverage specials and a special visit from Santa and his helpers! DJ party at the Dock Bar from 9:00pm to Midnight.

author: Austin Crawford
title: St. Patrick’s Day Party at Trader’s Dock Bar at Champlin's
summary: May the luck of the Irish be with us all the way into June! Stop by the Dock Bar to enjoy the DJ Party from 9:00pm to Midnight. We'll be featuring themed food and beverage specials throughout the day.
content: May the luck of the Irish be with us all the way into June! Stop by the Dock Bar to enjoy the DJ Party from 9:00pm to Midnight. We'll be featuring themed food and beverage specials throughout the day.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Champlin’s Community Market
summary: Stop by to check out our pop-up Community Market under the Event Tent. The market features a great variety of local arts, crafts and local products.
content: Stop by to check out our pop-up Community Market under the Event Tent. The market features a great variety of local arts, crafts and local products.

author: Austin Crawford
title: DJ at Champlin's
summary: Dance the night away - summer never ends! DJ Saturday nights at Trader's Dock Bar from 9:00pm to Midnight.
content: Dance the night away - summer never ends! DJ Saturday nights at Trader's Dock Bar from 9:00pm to Midnight.
